source: Learning Ansible with Rocky - Ansistrano Deployments: Running tasks before and after deployment steps

questions.q: Where can you intervene with Ansistrano hooks?
options: Before and after each of the five steps
questions.why: You can run a task file before and after each of Setup, Update Code, Symlink Shared, Symlink, Clean Up.

questions.q: What is the variable pattern to run a task file BEFORE a given step?
To run something at the very beginning of a deployment, which hook fits?
questions.why: Setup is the first step, so before_setup runs at the very start.

questions.q: To restart Apache after the new release goes live, which hook does the example use?
questions.why: The Symlink step swings current to the new release; after_symlink restarts httpd once it is live.

questions.q: In the 'send a mail at deployment start' example, what module and delegation are used?
options: The debug module, run on the target
questions.why: The before-setup task uses the mail module delegated to localhost (the control node).
